title: capture-buffer.conversation_summary
description: T20:capture-buffer conversation_summary event (WS-321 Phase B). Emitted by /session-end when adoption_phase=M0 to capture session content that didn't land in a file. The summary is generated by Claude during session-end and seeds the ignition proposal's archetype/principle inference.

turn_count.description: Number of conversation turns in the session

session_id.description: Reference to the session that produced this summary, if available
